pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-003 (Security & Privacy/Knowledge) excluded: edge_case: 1 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.413. Highest framework: EU AI Act at 0.413.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case scope, Security & Privacy, composite 0.413. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Security & Privacy (composite 0.413)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Security & Privacy at ~42% market presence. Secure memory/context storage in AI applications. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
